backend_version: CUDA compilation tools, release 13.3, V13.3.33; libNVVM IR 2.0 debug 3.2

stages.representation: pure inline PTX cvt.rna.tf32.f32 with an i32 output and f32 input
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM compiled the fresh 702-byte NVVM IR fixture (SHA-256 10498f999cc34865430b1f8d64021483334eb3c83d32fb2bb08a1c28b284b7c7) to 625-byte PTX 9.3 (SHA-256 d43ba7bc4ca91e3bfeac5ee8b4e3ceffe56943bae28a17e2f5440ff30500397e) and 1,808-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 de830d41c3ff7ae593112eed2361814d717cc66332aad9146a9336911d6e14cf), retaining the exact instruction and =r,f constraints.

stages.representation: exact-floor inline instruction fixture plus libNVVM-emitted PTX cross-check
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 282-byte exact sm_80/PTX 7.0 fixture (SHA-256 fa8e77156d6f3b4fa592ac6652d220f33ffe1df3e23d80715c8715ba7ef80f1b) and produced a 3,240-byte cubin (SHA-256 dd4762da0d14241138620d6e9e08e09deb39fc20f6eb124d6bcdf9c7295cf4fe). It also assembled the libNVVM-emitted PTX to a 3,240-byte cubin (SHA-256 9af0070a67901f2348ab176bf45e4570664d84bc0312ab6d797ebf2c70326f15).
stages.tool_version: Cuda compilation tools, release 13.3, V13.3.33; build cuda_13.3.r13.3/compiler.37862127_0

stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 nvJitLink 13.3 consumed the fresh LTOIR and produced a 3,240-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 0d4de7970f5141c056194d046e10dd4b455e84bccd02fe82d8dcea808c42e9e4).
